name: Jai Agrawal
summary: 4th-year B.Tech CSE (AI) student at MIT Bengaluru with a consistent track record of shipping production-grade systems - from real-time industrial AI platforms deployed on AWS to RAG pipelines, deep learning models, and autonomous AI agents. Experienced across the full stack: backend APIs, ML/GenAI, cloud deployment, and client-facing delivery.

bullets: Built and deployed production-grade RESTful backend APIs (Python, Django, OPC UA) for real-time CNC machine monitoring with 2-second refresh intervals, enabling continuous telemetry ingestion and operational analytics across multiple machines simultaneously.

Developed a machine-state classification system (Running / Idle / Error) that surfaced production-ready operational insights from raw sensor data; code reviewed, approved, and merged into the core engineering repository.

Designed a scalable multi-machine ETL pipeline architecture with end-to-end ownership - from data ingestion and schema design to trend visualisation and threshold-based alerting for business stakeholders.
Validated the full system as a proof-of-concept before production rollout; troubleshot and resolved integration issues across the OPC UA-Django-MongoDB stack under senior mentorship.

Sole technical owner of end-to-end e-commerce infrastructure - architected and deployed a custom Shopify storefront from scratch, handling domain configuration, theme customisation, and go-live launch coordination.
Built internal operational workflows for inventory management and catalog automation, reducing manual overhead for business stakeholders.
Generated and interpreted sales/inventory analytics to surface actionable business insights; presented findings directly to stakeholders.
Onboarded and trained non-technical team members on platform workflows - bridging the gap between technical systems and business operations.
Independently acquired and delivered client projects end-to-end - from requirements gathering and design to deployment - across multiple industries.
Built and launched custom websites and Shopify storefronts tailored to each client's business needs, handling full technical delivery solo.
Managed complete client communication cycles - scoping, iterative feedback, and on-time delivery - demonstrating ownership and reliability under real business expectations.

projects.name: ForgeMind AI - Industrial Machine Monitoring Platform
bullets: Built a real-time AI-powered platform monitoring 6 CNC machines simultaneously with 2-second telemetry refresh, an Isolation Forest anomaly detection model achieving 95% accuracy, a dual-layer alert system, and Redis caching delivering ~80% API response time improvement - deployed on AWS EC2 via Docker with 15+ REST endpoints and WebSocket streams.

Architected the full production stack end-to-end: async FastAPI backend, Motor (MongoDB async driver), React dashboard with live Recharts visualisations, Nginx reverse proxy, and Dockerised microservices.

projects.name: FinQuery - Financial Document RAG System
bullets: Built a production-grade Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system for financial document analysis - enabling natural language Q&A over SEC filings, annual reports, and earnings transcripts with cited answers and semantic search powered by ChromaDB and sentence-transformer embeddings.

Engineered a full-stack pipeline from PDF ingestion and chunking through vector storage, Groq LLM inference, and a Next.js frontend with conversation memory - deployed on AWS EC2 with Docker Compose and CI/CD.

projects.name: JobAgent - Autonomous Job-Hunting AI Pipeline
bullets: Built a fully autonomous job-hunting agent that runs daily at 7 AM - scraping listings, scoring each against a user profile using an LLM (1-10 match score with reasoning), and filtering above a configurable threshold; implemented SHA-256 deduplication via SQLite.

Engineered an end-to-end LLM-powered personalisation pipeline: tailors the resume and generates a custom cover letter per job, ReportLab renders both as PDFs, and Gmail SMTP delivers a formatted daily digest - fully automated from scrape to inbox.

projects.name: VisionAI - Real-time Navigation Assistant for the Visually Impaired
bullets: Built an AI-powered real-time navigation assistant using YOLOv8 and OpenCV to detect obstacles, estimate distances, and deliver voice-based guidance for visually impaired users; achieved 92.8% detection accuracy at real-time inference speeds.
Architected an end-to-end perception-to-speech pipeline - object detection, spatial reasoning, voice output - designed for low-latency deployment on edge hardware.

projects.name: Brain Tumor Segmentation
bullets: Engineered an end-to-end U-Net pipeline for pixel-level brain tumor segmentation on MRI scans; trained on 19,000+ preprocessed 2D slices extracted from 3D NIfTI volumes of the BraTS2020 dataset.
Implemented custom Dice Loss and IoU metrics alongside data augmentation; deployed as a Streamlit web app enabling real-time tumor mask prediction.

projects.name: Real-time CNC Data Dashboard
bullets: Built a production-deployed real-time industrial monitoring dashboard tracking CNC machine telemetry across multi-machine environments with automated 2-second data refresh and threshold-based alerting.
Designed a MongoDB schema supporting historical trend analytics and stakeholder reporting; delivered with full end-to-end ownership from backend API design to frontend integration.

projects.name: Lip Reading System - Sequence Prediction from Silent Video
bullets: Framed lip reading as a temporal sequence modelling problem: trained a deep learning model to predict spoken words from silent video frames, achieving ~80% accuracy on 1k-2k labelled samples.
Built an automated subtitle generation pipeline on top of the model output, improving accessibility for hearing-impaired users.

projects.name: Predictive Maintenance Web App (EY Techathon 6.0)
bullets: Built a full-stack automobile maintenance platform with role-based User and Admin dashboards, vehicle sensor analytics, and real-time component failure alerts - designed and shipped end-to-end within the hackathon window.

projects.name: AutomationML Intelligence Suite (Honeywell 48-hr Hackathon)
bullets: Built a C# application suite that parses AutomationML (AML) files to extract OPC UA node definitions and dynamically spins up a fully working OPC UA server for simulation; stores telemetry data in MongoDB.
Delivered under 48-hour time pressure as part of a Top 12 / 150 Teams finish.

projects.name: Jarvis - Voice-Controlled AI Assistant
bullets: Built a modular voice-controlled AI assistant using a speech-to-text pipeline for intent parsing, orchestrating actions across Spotify and YouTube APIs with a command-routing architecture designed for easy extensibility; published open-source on GitHub.

leadership.title: Startup Guidance & Development Head - E-Cell MIT
leadership.details: Mentoring 9 student startups on research, solution validation, and go-to-market strategies; hosted 2 alumni podcast episodes on the official E-Cell YouTube channel.

leadership.title: Top 12 / 150 Teams - Honeywell 48-hour Hackathon
leadership.details: Built the AutomationML Intelligence Suite - a C# + OPC UA system that parses AML files and spins up live OPC UA servers - under time pressure.

leadership.title: EY Techathon 6.0 - Certificate of Appreciation
leadership.details: Designed and deployed a full-stack predictive maintenance platform for the automobile industry within the hackathon window.

leadership.title: Panel Genesis (3-day Event Lead)
leadership.details: Managed 15 competing teams, coordinated with 12 judges, and led a 5-member operations team to execute the event end-to-end.
